name: chalmuns
description: ButtersesHouse Claude Code plugins — pattern learning and skill model right-sizing.

plugins.name: pattern-learner
plugins.description: Extracts recurring coding conventions from PR review history and writes approved rules to CLAUDE.md and skill files.

plugins.name: skill-right-sizing
plugins.description: right-size-skills proposes the cheapest model/effort each skill needs; skill-compare A/B tests the change with a cost-adjusted verdict before you adopt it.

plugins.name: skill-right-sizing-beta
plugins.description: Bleeding-edge BETA of skill-right-sizing — newest and least-tested. Installed DISABLED; enable at your own risk. Handy for running skill-compare --channels to A/B stable vs beta.
